modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Difficulty creating a folder in Outlook.

full_description_text:  
User is attempting to create a new folder in Outlook. They are unsure of the steps required to complete this action. The issue may involve navigating the interface or understanding folder management. Further assistance may be needed to resolve this.
short_description: Difficulty creating a folder in Outlook.
description: User is attempting to create a new folder in Outlook. They are unsure of the steps required to complete this action. The issue may involve navigating the interface or understanding folder management. Further assistance may be needed to resolve this.
